pageTitle: Relevant queries in the podcast collection of {podcast_name}

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.text: This website uses necessary technical cookies for its operation and analytics cookies to improve the user experience. By continuing to browse, you accept the use of cookies.

main.title: Query system for the podcast collection of {podcast_name}

queryType.legend: What type of query do you want to perform?
queryType.topicsDesc: Search for specific information about topics discussed in the podcasts
queryType.speakersDesc: Analyze statistics and participation patterns of the speakers
queryType.faqDesc: Explore the most interesting queries made previously, organized by categories

topics.heading: Topic queries
topics.questionHelp: Describe what you want to know about {podcast_name} podcasts. You can use voice with the microphone button.
topics.micAriaLabel: Use voice recognition to type the question
topics.micHint: 💡 If you have microphone issues, use the diagnostic button (ℹ️)
topics.langHelp: Select the language in which you want to receive the answer
topics.submitHelp: Press Enter or click to send your query

results.heading: Result
results.noResponse: No response available for this language.

share.heading: 🔗 Share this query
share.desc: You can share this query with others using this URL:
share.copyError: Could not copy the URL. Please copy it manually.

vote.heading: Was this response useful to you?
vote.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this query

similar.heading: 🔍 Related queries
similar.desc: Other semantically similar queries that might interest you:

speakers.heading: Speaker analysis
speakers.startDateHelp: Select the start date of the period to analyze
speakers.endDateHelp: Select the end date of the period to analyze
speakers.speakersPlaceholder: Select dates first to load speakers
speakers.speakersHelp: Hold Ctrl (Cmd on Mac) to select multiple speakers. Speakers will load when you select the dates.
speakers.speakersHelpLoaded: Hold Ctrl (Cmd on Mac) to select multiple speakers.

faq.heading: Featured queries
faq.desc: Queries selected for their interest, organized by categories. Click on any query to see the full answer.
faq.emptyDesc: Featured queries will appear here when the administrator selects them.

errors.timeout: The query took too long. Please try again.
errors.voiceNotAvailable: Voice recognition is not available in this browser

legal.privacy:
Privacy Policy:

This application processes your queries to provide relevant answers. Data is processed in accordance with GDPR and LOPDGDD. For more information, contact the data controller.
legal.notice:

legal.cookiePolicy:
Cookie Policy:

We use technical cookies necessary for the website to function and analytics cookies to improve the experience. You can configure your preferences at any time.
legal.a11yInfo:
Accessibility Information:

This website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA Guidelines. It has accessibility controls, keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility. To report accessibility issues, contact support.
legal.cookieConfig:
Cookie Settings:

Technical cookies: Required (cannot be disabled)
Analytics cookies: Can be enabled/disabled
Personalization cookies: Can be enabled/disabled
